subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! His Eminence Afnán hath desired to receive, as a gift, from the Treasury of Divine Knowledge in the Bayán [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد جناب افنان اراده نموده از کنز معرفت الهی در بیان بر سبیل ارمغان از
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @wisdom [hikmat], @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
